nipm.name: LabVIEW
nipm.details: LabVIEW runtime and development packages from the NI feeds.

nipm.name: VI Analyzer support
nipm.details: NI VI Analyzer support package used by the analyzer runners.

nipm.name: NI Unit Test Framework
nipm.details: NI UTF support package used by the Windows unit-test runner.

nipm.name: JKI Dragon
nipm.details: JKI Dragon dependency-management tooling installed from the LabVIEW 2026 NI Package Manager feed.

nipm.name: VI Package Manager
nipm.details: NI-published Windows VIPM package that enables VIPC application during worker builds. Linux installs VIPM from the native Debian package during its worker build.

system.name: VI Browser 2.0 toimages runner
system.details: Batch runner compiled from repo Go source; Linux uses the toimages GHCR image and Windows builds runner.exe in the workflow.

system.name: lvctl render engine
system.details: Renderer used by VI Browser 2.0 to drive LabVIEW and emit position-aware frame JSON.
